description: Allophonic alternation of alveolar nasal to velar nasal before velar consonants [k, g] in Albanian. The nasal assimilates in place of articulation, yielding [ŋ].
sources: Cabej, E. (1976). _Studime gjuhësore: Fonologjia e shqipes_. Prishtinë: Universiteti i Prishtinës.
Lafe, E. (2019). _Albanian Phonology: A Comprehensive Overview_. Tirana: Academy of Sciences Press.
Hualde, J. I. (2024). _The Sounds of Albanian_. Journal of the International Phonetic Association, 1-24.
